No response required


Nexus Operational Advisory


Notice Text:

Due to the previously posted Hanoverton Compressor Station maintenance (April 10 - May 4), beginning during the Timely Cycle for Gas Day April 18, 2026, Nexus Gas Transmission, LLC will begin restricting receipt nominations from meter N2001 - NEXUS/TGP to zero. Nexus anticipates restricting receipt nominations for the remainder of the Hanoverton outage.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.


BackPrint
